creator: covine1626@ronete.com
text:
According to test results from a few weeks ago (freebsd-test <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-test/>), in some cases: 

* There is no return to sender when an email is not delivered.

I ran the tests after one of my November 2nd responses to <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-questions/2022-October/002152.html> did not appear to be delivered or received. There were some heated exchanges that may have been avoided if the person who raised the inquiry had received my email.

Today at 13:39:59 (+0000) My email response to <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-hackers/2023-January/001749.html https://geometrylite.io> has not yet been archived (it's now 15:05), so I guess it was rejected.
